name: Nashik District Onion Growers Cooperative
focus: Collective onion grading, storage and direct marketing
notes: Members access shared pack houses and storage to negotiate better prices at Lasalgaon and Pimpalgaon.

name: Mahagrapes
focus: Export marketing support for grapes with cold chain assistance
notes: Provides pre-cooling, packhouse and export tie-ups for member farmers.

name: Karnataka HOPCOMS
focus: Federation marketing fruits and vegetables across urban outlets
notes: Procures directly from farmers at transparent prices and sells through HOPCOMS counters.
